CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, input_string String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, '     Hello, world!     '), (2, 'Test string with trailing spaces     '), (3, 'NoSpaces'), (4, '     Leading and trailing     ');
SELECT trimRight(input_string) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT trimRight(input_string) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT trimRight(input_string) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
SELECT trimRight(input_string) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 4;
SELECT id, trimRight(input_string) AS trimmed_string FROM test_strings;
SELECT count(*) FROM (SELECT trimRight(input_string) FROM test_strings WHERE trimRight(input_string) != input_string) AS trimmed;
SELECT id, trimRight(input_string) AS trimmed_string FROM test_strings WHERE input_string LIKE '%    ';
WITH (SELECT trimRight(input_string) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1) AS result SELECT result;
SELECT trimRight(concat('Trim this string: ', input_string)) FROM test_strings;
CREATE TABLE test_results AS SELECT id, trimRight(input_string) AS trimmed_string FROM test_strings;
SELECT count(*) FROM test_results WHERE trimmed_string = '     Hello, world!';
SELECT id, trimRight(concat('Before: ', input_string, ' After: ', trimRight(input_string))) AS debug FROM test_strings;
